data.title: Create plugins/dso/agents/ui-designer.md with Lite track, phases 1-4, phase 6, CACHE_MISSING, and scope-split passthrough
data.description:
## What
Create plugins/dso/agents/ui-designer.md — the complete dso:ui-designer agent definition. This agent captures the design creation logic from design-wireframe (Phases 1-4, Lite track, Phase 6) as a dispatchable sub-agent. Phase 5 (Design Review) is NOT included (moves to preplanning in story 8163-83a4).

## YAML Frontmatter
```yaml
---
name: ui-designer
model: sonnet
description: >
  Creates design artifacts for a story ID. Produces a Design Brief (Lite track) or
  full Design Manifest (spatial layout tree, SVG blueprint, token overlay, manifest).
  Returns structured payload conforming to plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ui-designer-payload.md.
tools:
  - Read
  - Glob
  - Grep
  - Write
  - Edit
  - Bash
---
```

## Logic to Include
1. Complexity Triage (Step 0): classify story as Lite or Full track
2. Lite Track: Design Brief (Steps 1-4 from design-wireframe Lite section)
3. Full Track Phase 1: Story & Context Loading
4. Full Track Phase 2: Application Review
5. Full Track Phase 3: Design Analysis
6. Full Track Phase 4: Design Creation
7. Full Track Phase 6: Finalization (linking artifacts to story, reporting)
   NOTE: Phase 5 (Design Review) is excluded — it is orchestrated by preplanning (story 8163-83a4)

## Stack Adapter Integration
Must call resolve-stack-adapter.sh at startup:
```bash
ADAPTER_FILE=$(bash ".claude/scripts/dso resolve-stack-adapter.sh")  # shim-exempt: internal orchestration script
```

## Return Payload
After completing Phase 6 (or Lite Step 4), the agent must return a structured payload
conforming to plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ui-designer-payload.md. Include this section:
'## Return Payload (contract: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ui-designer-payload.md)'

## CACHE_MISSING Handling
When UI discovery cache is absent or stale:
- Return cache_status: CACHE_MISSING
- Include actionable instructions: 'Run /dso:ui-discover <story-id> to refresh the UI discovery cache'
- Do NOT proceed with Phases 2-4 until caller resolves cache

## Scope-Split Proposals
When the pragmatic scope splitter triggers (in Phase 4 Design Creation), include scope_split_proposals in the return payload. These bubble up to the preplanning caller for story creation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Agent file exists at plugins/dso/agents/ui-designer.md
- YAML frontmatter has name: ui-designer, model: sonnet
- File references plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ui-designer-payload.md
- File contains 'CACHE_MISSING' signal handling
- File calls 'resolve-stack-adapter.sh'
- All 6 phases/tracks present (lite, 1, 2, 3, 4, 6)
- Tests in tests/scripts/test-ui-designer-agent.sh pass

## testing_mode: RED
New behavior; red-test-writer writes structural and behavioral tests first.

## Test file location
tests/scripts/test-ui-designer-agent.sh (follows tests/scripts/ pattern)
